sections.paragraph:
Original: ענוּב

Transliteration: ‛ânûb

Phonetic: aw-noob'

BDB Definition:

Anub = "confederate"
  1. son of Coz, descendant of Judah and Caleb through Ashur, the father of Tekoa

Origin: pass. part. from the same as H6025

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
